attributes.name: Adult Beginner 2 & 3 - Thursday 5:45pm
attributes.description: Please note: This class shares ice with the youth learn to skate session at the same time. The first 30 minute are generally a practice/warm-up while the second 30 minutes are the class time. First week of classes will begin from 5:45pm without the practice/warm-up. Beginner 2 (Alpha equivalent) & Adult Beginner 2 Curriculum: 1. Forward Stroking 2. Forward Crossovers left over right (5) 3. Forward Crossovers right over left (5) 4. One foot snowplow stop 5. Two foot turn. Beginner 3 (Beta equivalent) & Adult Beginner 3 Curriculum: 1. Backward Crossovers right over left (5) 2. Backward Crossovers left over right (5) 3. Backward Stroking (6) 4. Right T-Stop 5. Left T-Stop 6. Introduction to Forward Edges
